<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

All tests pass after verifying StreamListLogo export and matching MaterialIcons movie-filter. </details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_


Here is what was implemented.

### What changed

1. **`SplashScreen`** (`src/screens/SplashScreen.tsx`)  
   - Full-screen `surface_container` background.  
   - Same branding as the app bar: **`movie-filter`** `MaterialIcons` icon (`colors.primary_container`) and **`STREAMLIST_APP_DISPLAY_NAME`**.  
   - Content is **centered** in a column (icon above, name below).  
   - **Icon animation:** repeating scale pulse (1 → 1.08 → 1) with `Easing.inOut`, `useNativeDriver: true`.  
   - After **1.8s**, `navigation.replace('MainTabs')` so the splash is not kept on the stack.

2. **`StreamListLogo.tsx`**  
   - Exported **`STREAMLIST_APP_DISPLAY_NAME`** so the splash and header share one app name string.

3. **Navigation** (`src/navigation/types.ts`, `RootNavigator.tsx`)  
   - Added **`Splash`** to `RootStackParamList`.  
   - Root stack **`initialRouteName="Splash"`**, with splash **`contentStyle`** using `surface_container` and **`gestureEnabled: false`**.

### Files touched

- `streamlist/src/screens/SplashScreen.tsx` (new)  
- `streamlist/src/components/StreamListLogo.tsx`  
- `streamlist/src/navigation/types.ts`  
- `streamlist/src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx`  

`GlobalAppBar` does not live in `App.tsx`; it uses **`StreamListLogo`** (that `movie-filter` icon). The splash reuses the same icon, color token, and exported name.

Tests: `npx jest --watchman=false` — all **11** suites passed (including `App.test.tsx`).

---

_**User**_

@streamlist/src/screens/SplashScreen.tsx make icon and app name in one line, icon on left side and app name on right side. Do some slide animation

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Updating UI layout**

I'm implementing a slide-in animation with timed transitions for the icon and text elements. I'm simplifying the entrance animation to use spring timing instead of oscillation, with separate translateX animations for icon and title. I'm removing the scale pulse loop to prioritize the slide animation focus. I'm implementing parallel slide-in animations from the sides for the icon and title. 

I'm adjusting the animation offsets to ensure proper entrance effect with centered row container. I'm implementing entrance slide animation from sides with 600ms duration and 1800ms total delay. 

I'm removing iconPulse animation and adjusting timing so entrance slide finishes at 0.6s. I'm refactoring the animated row layout to use a single Animated.View wrapper with opacity instead of applying opacity to each child element. I'm adjusting the animation structure to apply opacity to the parent Animated.View and translate transforms to child elements. 

I'm adjusting text alignment and font sizes for better readability in compact layouts. I'm adjusting typography styles for splash center alignment using headlineMd or titleLg with scaled font sizes. </details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_
